groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Foundation and Context
groupings.description: Global behavior, skill discovery, documentation maintenance, and diagrams for AIgile SDLC work.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Ideation and Specification
groupings.description: Skills for shaping ideas into scoped, testable, agent-ready work.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Architecture and Refactoring
groupings.description: Skills for improving module depth, locality, maintainability, and structural quality.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Planning and Execution
groupings.description: Skills for turning approved specs into executable plans, isolated workspaces, and verified task execution.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Implementation and Debugging
groupings.description: Skills for documented implementation, interface and UI delivery, test-first execution, and root-cause debugging.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Verification and Browser Reality
groupings.description: Skills for proving correctness in real browser and command-line environments before claiming completion.

groupings.title: AIgile SDLC Core: Delivery
groupings.description: Skills for review, pull requests, branch finishing, and delivery documentation.

groupings.title: Supporting: Communication
groupings.description: Skills for internal communication and prose cleanup.

groupings.title: Supporting: Token Control
groupings.description: Skills for fresh context, compressed interaction, and session compaction.

groupings.title: Supporting: Skill Authoring and Misc
groupings.description: Skills for creating new Agent Skills, learning support, and domain-specific workflows such as Terraform.
